title: Socket connection error after upgrading to n8n 1.95.2
symptom: After upgrading to n8n version 1.95.2, users experience a socket connection error when working on workflows, while other functionalities remain unaffected.
root_cause: A bug in n8n version 1.95.2 disrupts the socket connection, causing errors when users attempt to work on workflows. This issue does not affect other parts of the application.
fix_steps: Rollback to n8n version 1.94.1 by using the tag 'n8nio/n8n:1.94.1'
Alternatively, upgrade to a later version such as 1.97.0 if available.
agent_instruction: Rollback to n8n version 1.94.1 or upgrade to a later version to resolve the socket connection issue.
